source.notes: Verified from live Figma metadata on node 11348:1230. Desktop sections 12 and 13 are nested inside desktop group 11348:1452.

trackingRules.basecamp: Create one Basecamp card per numbered section.
trackingRules.timeTracking: Developers must log active development hours daily inside the project tracking Excel sheet.
trackingRules.exports: Each section card should reference desktop and mobile image exports from the matching folder.

sections.name: Global header + announcement
sections.scope: Announcement bar and header/navigation. Global scope; only include in PDP branch if header changes are required.

sections.name: Product buy section
sections.scope: Gallery, product title, subtitle, rating, price, shade picker, subscription selector, ATC, mini trust bullets, pairs-well-with mini carousel, cert icons, accordions, press quote.

sections.name: Complete the look upsell
sections.scope: Multi-item upsell list/cards, subtotal/compare price area, section CTA.
shopifyTargets: new PDP upsell section if custom subtotal behavior is needed

sections.name: Plant-derived ingredients
sections.scope: Ingredient carousel with heading, supporting copy, ingredient cards, arrows/slider.
shopifyTargets: product metafields for ingredient cards if content should be product-specific

sections.name: Beyond clean certification
sections.scope: Certification media plus copy, organic standard icons/seals.
shopifyTargets: new certification section if icon grid is required

sections.name: Results stats
sections.scope: Results heading, description, stat cards, carousel/slider behavior.
shopifyTargets: new stats-card block if Figma card design differs from current result-proof section

sections.name: How to use
sections.scope: Media/video panel, play control, how-to heading and instructional copy.
shopifyTargets: new how-to-use section if video overlay behavior is custom

sections.name: FAQ
sections.scope: FAQ accordion list and expanded mobile/desktop states.
shopifyTargets: new FAQ section if standalone template positioning is preferred

sections.name: Shop @ogee Instagram
sections.scope: Instagram/UGC rail, heading, hashtag/subcopy, slider, optional mobile CTA.
shopifyTargets: new instagram-ugc section if feed/content source is custom

sections.name: Positive reviews quote
sections.scope: Reviews count strip and featured customer quote.
shopifyTargets: review app integration if live review data is required

sections.name: Full customer reviews widget
sections.scope: Full reviews summary, rating distribution, filters, customer review list, and show-more behavior.
shopifyTargets: review app/widget integration if live review data is required
assets for exported review widget if rebuilding is not required

sections.name: Beauty picks recommendations
sections.scope: "Beauty Picks Just for You" recommendations/media card area. Desktop is nested in the bottom review group.

sections.name: Global footer + newsletter
sections.scope: Newsletter and footer. Global scope; only include in PDP branch if footer changes are required.
